'''Wrench''' was an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] that belonged to [[Rhys Dallows]], and was his most loyal companion. Wrench's serial number was unknown.

==History==
Wrench was Rhys Dallows most trusted friend and was his co-pilot for his [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighter]]. When Rhys' fighter was disabled by a mercenary ship, and was found by [[Reti]] in his personal ship the [[Zoomer]], Wrench woke Rhys up. Later it is likely that Wrench served as Rhys' co-pilot in a number of missions and at the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|attack]] of the [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Droid Control Ship]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']] {{1st}}
